name: Aerinite
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A blue mineral found only in frozen geodes.

name: Alamite
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: Its distinctive fluorescence makes it a favorite among rock collectors.

name: Amethyst
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 1–39, from geodes
description: A purple gemstone favored by many as a gift.

name: Aquamarine
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 40–79, from frozen geodes
description: A shimmery blue-green gem that washes away fear.

name: Baryte
obtainMethod: Break open Magma Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: The best specimens resemble a desert rose.

name: Basalt
obtainMethod: Break open Magma and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A dense, dark volcanic rock.

name: Bixite
obtainMethod: Break open Omni and Magma Geodes at the Blacksmith (rare)
description: A rare black mineral with a metallic sheen.

name: Calcite
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: This yellow crystal is speckled with shimmering nodules.

name: Celestine
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: Some early life forms had bones made from this.

name: Coal
obtainMethod: Mining coal nodes in the mines, from dust sprites, or Charcoal Kiln
description: A fuel source used to smelt ores in the furnace.

name: Copper Bar
obtainMethod: Smelt 5 Copper Ore + 1 Coal in a Furnace
description: A refined copper bar used in crafting and construction.

name: Copper Ore
obtainMethod: Mining copper nodes in the mines (floors 2–39) and Skull Cavern
description: A common metal ore used to make copper bars.

name: Diamond
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 50–120, from all geode types (rare)
description: A rare and precious gem coveted by all.

name: Dolomite
obtainMethod: Break open Magma Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: It can occur in coral reefs, often near an underwater volcano.

name: Earth Crystal
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 1–39, from geodes
description: A pale crystal found in the shallow mines.

name: Emerald
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 80–120, from magma geodes
description: A brilliant green gem that radiates a powerful aura.

name: Esperite
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: The crystals glow bright green when stimulated.

name: Fairy Stone
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: An old miner's song suggests these are made from the bones of ancient fairies.

name: Fire Opal
obtainMethod: Break open Magma Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A rare variety of opal, named for its red spots.

name: Fire Quartz
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 80–120, from magma geodes
description: A rare and powerful crystal that glows with inner heat.

name: Fluorapatite
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A delicate green mineral found in cold geodes.

name: Frozen Tear
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 40–79, from frozen geodes
description: A crystal said to be a fragment of a frozen dream.

name: Geminite
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: Occurs in brilliant clusters.

name: Ghost Crystal
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A clear crystal with an icy interior. Seems to emit a faint glow.

name: Gold Bar
obtainMethod: Smelt 5 Gold Ore + 1 Coal in a Furnace
description: A shiny gold bar valued for crafting and upgrades.

name: Gold Ore
obtainMethod: Mining gold nodes in the mines (floors 81–120) and Skull Cavern
description: A precious metal ore found deep in the mines.

name: Granite
obtainMethod: Break open Earth and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A coarse-grained igneous rock with specks of quartz and feldspar.

name: Helvite
obtainMethod: Break open Magma Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: It grows in a triangular column.

name: Hematite
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A heavy iron oxide mineral with a metallic luster.

name: Iridium Bar
obtainMethod: Smelt 5 Iridium Ore + 1 Coal in a Furnace
description: The hardest known metal, used to craft the finest equipment.

name: Iridium Ore
obtainMethod: Mining iridium nodes in Skull Cavern (deeper floors)
description: An extremely rare ore used to make the finest tools and equipment.

name: Iron Bar
obtainMethod: Smelt 5 Iron Ore + 1 Coal in a Furnace
description: A sturdy iron bar used in crafting and upgrades.

name: Iron Ore
obtainMethod: Mining iron nodes in the mines (floors 41–79)
description: A useful ore for crafting and construction.

name: Jade
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 40–79, from frozen geodes
description: A pale green gemstone that brings good luck.

name: Jagoite
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A high volume of tiny crystals makes it very glittery.

name: Jamborite
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: The crystals are so tightly packed it almost looks fuzzy.

name: Jasper
obtainMethod: Break open Omni Geodes and Magma Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A reddish-brown mineral with fine grain.

name: Kyanite
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: The geometric faces are as smooth as glass.

name: Lemon Stone
obtainMethod: Break open Magma Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: Some claim the powdered crystal is a dwarvish delicacy.

name: Limestone
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A sedimentary rock composed mainly of calcium carbonate.

name: Lunarite
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: The cratered white orbs form a tight cluster.

name: Malachite
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A popular ornamental stone, used in sculpture and to make green paint.

name: Marble
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A very popular material for sculptures and construction.

name: Mudstone
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A fine-grained rock made from ancient clay or mud.

name: Nekoite
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: The delicate shards form a tiny pink meadow.

name: Neptunite
obtainMethod: Break open Magma Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A jet-black crystal that is unusually reflective.

name: Obsidian
obtainMethod: Break open Magma and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A volcanic glass that forms when lava cools rapidly.

name: Ocean Stone
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: An old legend claims these stones are the mosaics of ancient mermaids.

name: Opal
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: Its internal structure causes it to reflect a rainbow of light.

name: Orpiment
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: Despite its high toxicity, this mineral is widely used in manufacturing and folk medicine.

name: Petrified Slime
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: This little guy may be 100,000 years old.

name: Prismatic Shard
obtainMethod: Found in Skull Cavern treasure chests, Iridium nodes, and Mystic Stones (extremely rare)
description: An otherworldly gem of immense value that shimmers with all colors.

name: Pyrite
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: Also called Fool's Gold due to its metallic yellow color.

name: Quartz
obtainMethod: Found in the mines on any floor, dropped by rock crabs
description: A clear crystal commonly found in the mines.

name: Radioactive Bar
obtainMethod: Smelt 5 Radioactive Ore + 1 Coal in a Furnace
description: A bar of highly unstable radioactive metal.

name: Radioactive Ore
obtainMethod: Mining radioactive nodes in Skull Cavern (during Qi quest)
description: Glowing ore that only appears during special Qi challenges.

name: Rainbow Shell
obtainMethod: Found on the beach as summer forage
description: A rare, iridescent shell found only on warm summer beaches.

name: Refined Quartz
obtainMethod: Smelt 1 Quartz or 1 Fire Quartz in a Furnace, or from Recycling Machine
description: A fine crystal used in crafting sprinklers and lightning rods.

name: Ruby
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 80–120, from magma geodes
description: A precious red gemstone symbolizing passion.

name: Sandstone
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A common type of stone with red and brown striations.

name: Slate
obtainMethod: Break open Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: It's extremely resistant to water, making it a good roofing material.

name: Soapstone
obtainMethod: Break open Frozen and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A soft mineral with a soapy texture.

name: Star Shards
obtainMethod: Break open Magma Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: No one knows how these form. Some scientists claim that the microscopic structure displays unnatural regularity.

name: Thunder Egg
obtainMethod: Break open Earth and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: According to legend, these are created when thunder gods fight.

name: Tigerseye
obtainMethod: Break open Magma Geodes and Omni Geodes at the Blacksmith
description: A stripe of shimmering gold gives this gem a warm luster.

name: Topaz
obtainMethod: Found in mines floors 1–39, from geodes
description: A pale yellow gemstone with a faint shimmer.
